message:
Fix Playwright bundling for bun compile standalone executables

Problem: When building with `bun build --compile`, Playwright's runtime
path resolution code uses require.resolve() which gets baked into the
binary with absolute paths from the build machine. At runtime, these
paths don't exist on the user's machine, causing "Cannot find module"
errors.

Solution: Add a postinstall patch script that replaces the problematic
dynamic requires in playwright-core with inline values:
- nodePlatform.js: Replace require.resolve for coreDir with empty string
- userAgent.js: Inline the Playwright version string
- dependencies.js: Inline the language binding version
- program.js: Inline packageJSON object

Also adds CI verification steps to ensure patch is applied and binaries
work before release.

Bump version to v0.2.9

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -65,11 +65,32 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
         shell: bash
+      - name: Verify Playwright patch applied
+        run: |
+          # Verify the patch script ran and modified the files
+          if grep -q "PATCHED" node_modules/playwright-core/lib/server/utils/nodePlatform.js; then
+            echo "✓ Playwright patched successfully"
+          else
+            echo "✗ Playwright patch not applied!"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+        shell: bash
       - name: Build binaries
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
           ${{ matrix.build }}
         shell: bash
+      - name: Test built binaries
+        run: |
+          # Test that at least one binary runs without the package.json error
+          if [[ "$RUNNER_OS" == "Linux" ]]; then
+            ./dist/csctf-linux-x64 --version
+          elif [[ "$RUNNER_OS" == "macOS" ]]; then
+            ./dist/csctf-macos-arm64 --version || ./dist/csctf-macos-x64 --version
+          elif [[ "$RUNNER_OS" == "Windows" ]]; then
+            ./dist/csctf-windows-x64.exe --version
+          fi
+        shell: bash
       - name: Upload artifacts
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:

@@ -1,13 +1,14 @@
 {
   "name": "chat-shared-conversation-to-file",
-  "version": "0.2.8",
+  "version": "0.2.9",
   "description": "CLI to download public share links (ChatGPT/Gemini/Grok) and save clean Markdown + HTML transcripts.",
   "license": "MIT",
   "bin": {
     "csctf": "./dist/csctf"
   },
   "type": "module",
   "scripts": {
+    "postinstall": "bun scripts/patch-playwright.js",
     "build": "bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/csctf --external electron --external chromium-bidi/lib/cjs/bidiMapper/BidiMapper --external chromium-bidi/lib/cjs/cdp/CdpConnection",
     "build:mac-arm64": "bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/csctf-macos-arm64 --external electron --external chromium-bidi/lib/cjs/bidiMapper/BidiMapper --external chromium-bidi/lib/cjs/cdp/CdpConnection",
     "build:mac-x64": "bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/csctf-macos-x64 --external electron --external chromium-bidi/lib/cjs/bidiMapper/BidiMapper --external chromium-bidi/lib/cjs/cdp/CdpConnection",
